scripts.desktop:pack: npm run frontend:build && electron-packager . DevTrack --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist --overwrite --icon=desktop/assets/favicon --ignore=frontend/src --ignore=frontend/public --ignore=\.git && node desktop/patch-exe-icon.js
scripts.desktop:pack:builder: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run frontend:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.desktop:build: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run frontend:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:dist: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run frontend:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
